user_message: Can you help me triage this? The customer (Coho Winery) is asking about consumption trend.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-22 10:39 EST
Subject: Re: consumption trend Discussion - Next Steps

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with consumption trend. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
Date: 2024-02-19 16:49 EST
Subject: Follow-up: consumption trend Review

Our team encountered some challenges with consumption trend. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-18 12:15 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Coho Winery consumption trend

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our VP Engineering is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: consumption trend Discussion - Coho Winery
Date: 2024-01-13
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Eric Kim (Coho Winery), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft), Kevin (Coho Winery)

[00:01:15] Eric Kim (Coho Winery): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is consumption trend.

[00:07:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around budget approval.

[00:12:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around partner engagement.

[00:17:00] Kevin (Coho Winery): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?

[00:20:00] Eric Kim (Coho Winery): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:25:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:30:00] Kevin (Coho Winery): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:33:00] Kevin (Coho Winery): Let me add some context -- we've been working on cost optimization and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:36:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about integration complexity. Can we address those?
